chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1450 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 23.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Rafique Phulpoto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General along with Nadeem Ahmed Mangi, Jr. Clerk, Municipal committee Khairpur Mir’s..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for respondent No.5, files statement/ compliance report along with copy of subject cheque, same is taken on record. Copy thereof has been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. The counsel for respondent No.5, submits that cheque of Rs.200,000/- (two lacs rupees) has already been given to the petitioner and further undertakes to pay the remaining amount of petitioner in the installments each of Rs.200,000/-(Two lac) per month till realization of outstanding. On such undertaking counsel for petitioner satisfied and does not press the instant petition. The respondent NO.5 Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee Khairpur is directed to comply with the undertaking and in case of failure, the contempt proceedings shall be initiated against him. The petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
